title: Reading and Use of English – Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: He forgot about his dentist appointment.

questions.firstSentence: They are expanding the city centre.
questions.explanation: Tests passive or gerund forms with 'being'.

questions.firstSentence: This is the first time I have met a celebrity.
questions.explanation: Tests negative structures with 'never' (e.g. inversion or perfect forms).

questions.firstSentence: The stairs are too steep for elderly people.
She was in the habit of exercising at dawn.
questions.explanation: Tests 'used to' or 'be/get used to' structures.

questions.firstSentence: She wanted to know where he had grown up.
questions.explanation: Tests reported speech with an infinitive or question structure.

questions.firstSentence: Without the map, we would have got lost.
questions.beforeGap: If we hadn't had the map, we
